schema_sql: create table products (id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(), sku text unique, title text not null, category text not null, tagline text, description text, price_cents integer not null, image_url text, badge text check (badge in ('featured','instock')), in_stock boolean default true, origin text, era text, dimensions text, created_at timestamptz default now());

rows.title: Peacock Chair
rows.description: 1970s rattan peacock chair, restored cane back. A dramatic seating option for sunrooms, studios, or anywhere bold.

rows.title: Rattan Lounge Chair
rows.description: Newly restored upholstery in neutral linen. A statement piece that catches light beautifully.

rows.title: Blue MCM Armchair
rows.description: Deep blue upholstery on a rattan-accented mid-century base. Unexpected and striking.

rows.title: Rattan Armchair
rows.description: A sturdy woven rattan armchair, ready to be your favorite reading spot.

rows.title: Striped Wicker Chair
rows.description: A round-backed wicker chair with striped detailing. Lightweight and surprisingly comfortable.

rows.title: Teal MCM Chair
rows.description: A sleek teal side chair in the mid-century modern tradition — understated confidence.

rows.title: Woven Floor Lamp
rows.description: A naturalistic wicker floor lamp with a tightly woven pole form. Rewired with modern fittings.

rows.title: Arched Étagère
rows.description: Tall woven shelving unit with a graceful arched top and multiple display shelves.

rows.title: Rattan Bookshelf
rows.description: Open rattan bookshelf — a rare combination of organic material and clean modernism.

rows.title: Wicker Cabinet
rows.description: Closed wicker cabinet with woven doors — hides the clutter, keeps the character.
